review_title: Better Quality Information
author: Jamie G.
pros: As a sales executive there are certain things I check everyday. Prime amongst them is Dealfront. The ability to see who is on the website, what pages they’ve been looking at and their keyword searches helps me to do everything from understand intent leads better to helping to plan ABM campaigns based on behaviours.
cons: There are occasional issues where it can get the company on the website wrong, but nothing is perfect.

review_title: An excellent product to increase our marketing output
description: The process was extremely easy. From the moment I set up the trial I never had a problem getting an answer to any questions or issues that I had. Additionally, the integration with my crm couldn't have been easier. It was point and click.
author: Robert E.
pros: The ease of use. This program is very intuitive to use. Additionally I like how robust the custom feeds feature is. I can set up any number of feeds from repeat visitors to how they actually came to our website (google cpc, bing cpc, organic, etc.)
cons: As of right now there is nothing that I do not like about this software. I can not begin to emphasize how easy this program is to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Be careful, this is a fraudulent company
description: Their so-called IP recognition service misidentifies many companies as the carriers they use or whatever. As a medical device company, it's not a hard guess who will visit our website. Yet 70% of the traffic they identified comes from industries unrelated to us. Of the 30% of valid traffic, it is a stroke of luck to find the necessary contacts. Out of nearly 20,000 contacts from 2,000 companies that visited our website in a year, less than 100 were from the purchasing department I really need. Each contact had to be manually filtered out one by one, with contact information also being manually revealed, taking about 30 seconds per contact. After the wait, 80% of the contacts turned out to have no contact information at all, and the platform was incapable of excluding them. Having manually revealed over 1500 contacts, I only got fewer than 300 emails. The remaining 700+ credits expired with the subscription. Since the emails were from LinkedIn, the contacts may have left the company without updating their profiles. So the value that can actually be gotten from their platform will be smaller. Upon realizing that the platform was a waste of time and money, I discovered that my subscription had been auto-renewed with no means of cancellation. Throughout my time using their service, there was no mention of their terms and conditions, that you have to cancel before 30 days of the renewal. And there was no reminder at all. However, after the auto-renewal, everyone started to bring up their terms and conditions like it's the bible and ignored my requests for negotiation.
author: Sherry T.
pros: Nothing. The main use of the tool is to identify the companies who visit your website. This sounds good, but they can't tell you the exact person.
cons: Shameless renewal clause, hidden in their terms and conditions which no one had ever mentioned before. If you didn't tell them to cancel before 30 days of the renewal, they will auto-renew and it can't be canceled.

review_title: Beyond traditional analytics - the best tool to see which content is
author: Karen C.
pros: Leadfeeder lets you see the specific pages that companies visited. This has been proven extremely valuable to our team who can now gauge which type of content is performing the best. We can track user/company behavior as they move through our website. We can also see for how long they stayed on a certain page and where they came from (direct, referral, google, etc.).
cons: Pricing gets a little tricky when you have multiple domains under just one company. Additionally, due to a change in Google Analytics’ privacy policy there were some changes to Leadfeeder too.

review_title: The bridge between cold and warm leads
description: When we're cold emailing we are dealing with a cold audience who have never heard of us. When we're sending emails to our existing users/email subscribers, there's a chance we may send too many emails and annoy them. But Leadfeeder is the sweet spot in between. The leads are not cold because they visited our product. They're technically not warm because they haven't reached out to us. We can take the next step to initiate conversation and hear what their needs are to help them make better decisions.
author: Dinakar S.
pros: Leadfeeder overall is easy to use. Integrating with our site was easy too. It was just a few lines of code our developers had to add. We did it in less than 5 minutes. Bing to find who's visiting our product and then reaching out them has been so impactful for us. Some people simply leave because their questions and concerns weren't answered. Leadfeeder is our second chance to make a good impression.
cons: Prospecting tools are not important (because we use seperate tools for that) but still, that could be improved. For instance, based on the leads we get, Leadfeeder can show us similar companies/leads that are similar to the current leads' parameters. This will help us find more potential customers for our business. Due to the similarity they'll more likely be interested in our work.

review_title: A pretty good tool for buyer intent
author: João Pedro A.
pros: Leadfeeder it's a pretty nice tool if you need to know some intent data from your visitors, it's not the best but it gives you a lot anyway.
cons: It could be a bit better in detecting more intent data from more sources

review_title: Marketing Tool
description: Good in general and very successful in marketing
author: Ismaël D.
pros: The software is simple and effective above all easy to use
cons: I find the software a bit pricey on the premium plan
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Find out what companies are visiting your website, and turn that on in seconds
description: Leadfeeder allows to see in a very easy manner what visits you are getting from employees in your potential customer companies, and eventually reach out to them if there is a strong interest identified
author: Svetla M.
pros: The ease of integration, the loads of information available for each lead and the ability to integrate with Zapier, so you can customize the output, send it to slack or other tools
cons: So far works great and there's nothing missing or difficult to use
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Our secret sales weapon!!
author: Anthony M.
pros: Leadfeeder provides accurate data of visitors to our site. I really enjoy understanding the user's behavior across all of our content. The Hubspot integration is vital for our sales team. I usually start with reaching out on LinkedIn to leadership at the prospects we see.
cons: Can't think of anything!! Keep on improving what you already have.

review_title: LeadFeeder Review
description: My team and me are able to track our prospects and how they engage with our websites.
author: Caleb O.
pros: Leedfeeder is one of the most useful lead generation tool for me at the moment, I can easily identify individuals and companies visiting my website and turn them into customers.
cons: I wish to seem more sales-making features in future updates.

review_title: Track visitor activity-stay ahead of the crowd
description: Absolutely love the product and recommend it to all colleagues, since it’s a great way to gain insight in what both customers and potential clients are looking at on your website. There are many creative ways to further translate it to action. We use hubspot integration as well, so Leadfeeder provides valuable information to account managers as well
author: Alex F.
pros: The ease of use, the fact that we can have over 10 team members use account for different purposes in ways that are customizable for every function: customer success, sales, marketing.
cons: I was not happy with the newest targeting option they added, as it did not target properly, but we got refunded for the campaign we ran

review_title: Very helpful in tracking inbound website visitors and timely reaching out
description: Very satisfied with visit quality and leads quality.
author: Abhisek P.
pros: Most impactful feature was the ability to customize website visitors and leads according to our ideal customer profile and according to the pages they have viewed. The product was easy to use and integrable with Salesforce and many other platforms.
cons: If the visit is on a single page, dwell time is considered 0 - so if that can be improved, wherein we know how long a page was visited if the visit was only on a single page, that would be helpful

review_title: Doesn't track as much as they claim
description: It has potential, but hard to get help, i paid by accident no refund offered.
author: Jesper Q.
pros: It identified the visitors that does not fill a form, but very few... they informed us they tell us the visitor but their people data is outdated and thoose where not the visitors so that was false advertisement.
cons: That they can't track the person just the company in 2% of the visitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get more value from your website
description: Leadfeeder can help you turn your website from a brochure into a lead generation machine. It won't make miracles by itself, of course, but if you don't already track the things Leadfeeder can show you, you are doing something wrong.
author: Ottomatias P.
pros: It's easy to setup and has integrations to tools we already use (Mailchimp, Salesforce)
cons: It could filter ISPs better.

review_title: Unlocking B2B Marketing Insights
description: Great platform, although the decision to invest should be carefully evaluated in consideration of your specific needs and budget.
author: Joe C.
pros: We can now proactively reach out to potential leads that would have otherwise gone unnoticed. The lead scoring system has been particularly helpful in prioritizing and qualifying leads efficiently.
cons: While Lead Forensics has been a powerful tool, it's important to note that the success of the tool greatly depends on how well your team can leverage the data it provides. Additionally, pricing may be a consideration for smaller businesses as its pretty pricey
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Perfect Solution for Customer Data
description: Good support, good solution. Everything positive!
author: Benjamin H.
pros: Easy to use and all Infos about a potential customer with one click
cons: That I didn´t knew about it for years :)

review_title: Good marketing performance software
author: Cédric K.
pros: It is a good software to increase our marketing performance. It is easy to use and with an intuitive program the flow functionality is remarkable customize
cons: Nothing as disadvantages but more improvement and integration would be really nice

review_title: Leadfeeder is a game changer for our sales team and an invaluable outbound sales prospecting tool
description: Solid lead generation insights that fuel our outbound sales process. We save a lot of time and effort looking for contacts and having this information automatically be synced with Salesforce.
author: Zach E.
pros: The ability to see contacts associated with the company that is viewing our site is great! I love that Leadfeeder tracks the history of all site views from a particular company. Leadfeeder's workflow features that allow users to assign leads to people and have information pull from Salesforce is amazing. I really like that Leadfeeder allows us to hide ISP views and views that are not relatable to our ideal targets.
cons: Right now, there is nothing that I would say that I don't like about Leadfeeder. The only area of improvement that I see would be in the UI.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, works, automated
author: Tommi T.
pros: Fully automated, and actionable results to your email makes the solution easy to take into use and bringing value without any actions
cons: Reports could show even more information from each visits (or company statistics) details in smallest possible report.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Be careful with payment terms
author: André W.
pros: Simple to start with and you can use it if you have strong tracking on you web visitors.
cons: Customer service and they way they work with customers. Be careful with payment terms they will force you to pay even if you tried to cancel subscription and the system gave you an error and it was on renewal day. They do not send you a notice of renewal before - and they are 100% strict on terms. For our company it did not make sense. Product is not very helpful if you do not have very strong ability to connect user activity to specific users. Will only give you a potential company name - not super useful. You can do this in Google Analytics via network section and some ip filtering. For help on this just search on google and you will find several links/guides.

review_title: Great tool for seeing who was on your website
author: William C.
pros: Very easy integration into website. Easy reporting. Tons of offers for customer support.
cons: Somewhat pricey for small companies that get a lot of visitors but are only concerned with a few of them.

review_title: Great tool for providing visibility
description: This tool is great for providing visibility on who is visiting your site. This can then be used to identify and approach potential customers.
author: Tom R.

review_title: Easy to use
description: Better information as to whom is visiting our website
author: Ken I.
pros: Nice interface. What I like most is that it shows all pages viewed and how long a company was viewing each page.
cons: I believe it doesn't pick up every site visitor? I've had a couple companies reach out to us and there was no listing in leadfeeder that showed the company came to our site. I have no definitive proof of this, but it seems like it's missing a few. It could also be that the individual was not working at their office as it seems it only tracks corporate IP addresses. Personal IP addresses would be of little value anyways as it would be the IP of the service provider .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nothing short of exceptional! The information gathered has already proven invaluable.
author: William N.
pros: The ability to see who, when and where visitors are to our site. We are able to see a correlation between our endeavors and the traffic coming back in. Customer service! Leadfeeder has a deep commitment to sharing knowledge and helping us on the customer side quickly and always with a positive goal in mind.
cons: It is the same as most, we want more! While we get a good view into what companies are coming and a limited view of the contacts, we would like to go deeper. I think this will begin happening more and more as the system learns our site.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Closed loop Sales and Marketing for concept adopters
description: Overall I have been very please with the product. It provides a great quick-glance for the sales. Did Marketing/Sales activity x have an impact. Much easier for companies to get started with inbound understanding than price range rivalries like e.g. Agile CRM or Mautic. Lacks some stuff from Hubspots marketing light but on the other hand has more features than Hubspot Light.
author: Sampsa D.
pros: Ease of use
cons: Needs forms tracking.
